name: BB:ProtocolDefinition: Windows Protocols
notes: Edit this BB to include all common protocols (not including TCP) used by Windows servers that will be ignored for false positive tuning rules.
bb_references: BB:ProtocolDefinition: Windows Protocols on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: where IP protocol is one of the following ICMP.icmp_ip, UDP.udp_ip
TD_list: APPLY BB:ProtocolDefinition: Windows Protocols on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND where IP protocol is one of the following ICMP.icmp_ip, UDP.udp_ip
